'''Frona Zeffla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] individual who served as an employee in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Zeffla [[Death/Legends|died]] at her desk in her office within the Palace<ref name="Tyrant's Test" /> sometime prior to [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].<ref name="TERC" /> Following her death, Zeffla's body was not discovered for over a [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="Tyrant's Test" />

==Behind the scenes==
Frona Zeffla was mentioned in the [[1996]] novel, ''[[Tyrant's Test]]'', which was written by [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]].<ref name="Tyrant's Test" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
